hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines sanctions screening by unifying provider outputs into one operational workflow to enhance risk monitoring, case management, and audit-ready evidence for digital asset payments.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Payment sanctions screening lacks unified control
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to manage disparate sanctions screening outputs across multiple providers and systems. This fragmentation slows alert triage, creates gaps in case management, and weakens audit evidence for payment-related sanctions reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates sanctions alerts, provider outputs, case assignments, decision logs and audit evidence into a unified workflow so compliance teams can efficiently manage payment sanctions reviews with stronger traceability.
workflow_title: From sanctions alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes sanctions screening results through risk rules, alert triage, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation for structured compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns isolated sanctions screening results into structured cases, decisions, evidence, and reporting that help compliance teams manage payment sanctions risk efficiently and audibly.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps VASPs maintain audit-ready evidence and provider orchestration to support bank due diligence within controlled enterprise deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support payment sanctions screening workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how sanctions alerts integrate into case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports payment sanctions reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare provider orchestration options for sanctions screening
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for payment sanctions screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures provider sanctions alerts into connected workflows, cases, decision logs and regulatory rule updates for payment teams in digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle sanctions alert workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes sanctions alerts into structured case reviews with risk-based rules, escalation paths, reviewer assignments and linkage to payment transactions and counterparties.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence packages, case histories and decision logs to support traceable, audit-ready sanctions reviews and compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above sanctions providers and compliance tools, connecting their outputs into one operational layer with access governance and audit logging.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace sanctions providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, supporting compliance without disrupting existing vendor relationships.
final_title: Connect payment sanctions results into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes sanctions screening outputs into structured workflows, case management, decision logs and evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
